blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,957 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
